project.component: { "keyToString": { "Application.CLC.executor": "Run", "Application.CLI.executor": "Debug", "Application.FSMigrate.executor": "Run", "Application.JWKCLI.executor": "Run", "Application.OA4MPClientInstaller.executor": "Run", "Application.OA4MPServerInstaller.executor": "Run", "Application.QDL CLC.executor": "Run", "Application.QDL.executor": "Debug", "Application.QDLConfigLoader.executor": "Debug", "Application.SAS CLI.executor": "Debug", "Application.jwt.executor": "Debug", "Application.org.oa4mp.server.admin.oauth2.tools.JWKCLI.executor": "Debug", "Application.org.oa4mp.server.installer.OA4MPServerInstaller.executor": "Run", "DefaultHtmlFileTemplate": "HTML File", "Downloaded.Files.Path.Enabled": "false", "JUnit.QDLTests.testVFSFileClaimSourceA.executor": "Run", "JUnit.Test Suite.executor": "Run", "Java Scratch.Scratch (3).executor": "Run", "Java Scratch.Scratch.executor": "Run", "Java Scratch.Scratch_5.executor": "Run", "Maven. [org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-archetype-plugin:RELEASE:generate].executor": "Run", "Maven.myproxy [clean,install].executor": "Run", "Maven.myproxy-website [clean,install].executor": "Run", "Maven.oa4mp-parent [clean,install].executor": "Run", "Maven.proxy [org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-javadoc-plugin:3.5.0:javadoc].executor": "Run", "Repository.Attach.Annotations": "false", "Repository.Attach.JavaDocs": "false", "Repository.Attach.Sources": "false", "RunOnceActivity.OpenProjectViewOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Tomcat Server.DEV OA4MP.executor": "Run", "Tomcat Server.MyProxy.executor": "Run", "Tomcat Server.OA4MP server.executor": "Debug", "WebServerToolWindowFactoryState": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "jdk.selected.JAVA_MODULE": "11 (2)", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/ncsa/dev/ncsa-git/oa4mp/server-admin/src/main/resources/web-inf", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "project.structure.last.edited": "Libraries", "project.structure.proportion": "0.15", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.45913818", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "editor.preferences.fonts.default", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "Markdown", "PLAIN_TEXT", "JSON", "JAVA" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
More fallout from improving bootstrap sequence in command line utilities. Found some issues in the QDL storage module. Wrote basic Pelican startup scripts.
https://jira.ncsa.illinois.edu/browse/CIL-2278 Added regression tests to check that a revoked admin client stops all flows and access dead.

https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/260 removing old TX record tests. They are failing now thanks to a library change, but they are testing a serialization format we abandoned long ago, so reviving them is really just not worth it.
Checkin before release
https://github.com/cilogon/cilogon-java/issues/58 and streamlined creation of NCSA LDAP configuration stems. Integrating 6.2.0 changes
Routine checkin. Added a test, tweaked a few others.
Routine checkin. Added a test, tweaked a few others.
Port of CILogon DBService to OA4MP.
Port of CILogon DBService to OA4MP. Part 2
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/262 recreate the oa4mp website since an extra clean command to maven was in a build scipt, effectively removing newly created javadoc.
Updated website by removing some old cruft then rebuilding.
Cleanup for various items including tracking down "MyProxy" in various text strings.
Incorporating changes in 6.2.1 to publish to Maven
Commit pre-merge
Fixed https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/266 and https://jira.ncsa.illinois.edu/browse/CIL-2328. Tomcat adds its own default character set if not explicitly overridden.
Integrating fixes for https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/267 https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/268 https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/269
Added QDL stack trace when debugging enabled for a client. Store accessors needed cleanup too.
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/272 side effect of https://github.com/ncsa/security-lib/issues/60, help system sudited and now displaying properly in the CLI
6.2.2 checkin, includes website rebuild
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/273 and found a few verbose debug statements that were still printing too much. removed them.
Checkin of website rebuild, PDF refreshes
Updated server and client installer version numbers.
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/274 wrong skin referenced
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/270 and https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/275. Build script now copies well-known.war to staging directory so I don't have to.
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/276 add support for request_uri in QDL session
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/278, https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/279 Derby issues so that the OOBE (Out Of Box Experience) is as smooth as possible.
Added printing a stack trace (if servlet debug is set to trace only) in case of very odd errors.
Lots of documentation tweaks.
Website rebuild
FOund/corrected info in getting started blurb.
website update
re ove apache configuration
Fix for https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/282
Fix for https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/283
Fix for https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/284
Pre-travel commit. This includes fixes for https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/285 and https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/286.
Unit tests for key rotation checking.
More key rotation checking. Found bug that prevented running some unit tests and fixed it.
CLI: Fix https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/289 return formatted output of key subet in ls
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/290 and https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/288
Pre-travel chekin
All tests work now. Net effect of migratrion back up to zero!
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/107, https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/281, https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/299, https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/301

MESSAGE.value: https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/270 and https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/275. Build script now copies well-known.war to staging directory so I don't have to.
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/276 add support for request_uri in QDL session
https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/278, https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/279 Derby issues so that the OOBE (Out Of Box Experience) is as smooth as possible.
Added printing a stack trace (if servlet debug is set to trace only) in case of very odd errors.
FOund/corrected info in getting started blurb.
Pre-travel commit. This includes fixes for https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/285 and https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/286.
Unit tests for key rotation checking.
More key rotation checking. Found bug that prevented running some unit tests and fixed it.
CLI: Fix https://github.com/ncsa/oa4mp/issues/289 return formatted output of key subet in ls
All tests work now. Net effect of migratrion back up to zero!
